title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 5 of 1994
text: GOVERNMENT OF P\IDI A MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDLC TION Central Agricultural University, Imphal (Manipur) ORDINANCE. Imphal, the 30th August, 1994 No. 5 of 1994 No. VC CAU114(ESTABLIS)/93: Whereas the sanction of the Central Agricultural University scheme under the VIllth, Five Year Plan, as communicated by the Joint Seeretar,., Department of Agricultural Research and Education and Secretary. Indian Council of Agricultural Research vide letter number l(2)!92-Pl&M(Part-III) dated the 13th October, 1993 provides for the establishment of the Central Agricultural University for Nonh-Eastern Region with headquarters at Imphal (Manipur) having office of the Vice-Chancellor; Directorates of Instruction, Research and Extension Education, etc. and with College of Agriculture lManipur), College of Veterinary Sciences (Mizoram), Coilege of Agricultural Engineering and Post-Harvest Technology (Sikkim). College of Horticulture and Forestry (Arunachal Pradesh), College of Fisheries (Tripura). College of Post-Graduate Studies and College of Home Science (Meghalaya) in the States of .the North-EaStern Region as mentioned in respectiveparentheses: And whereas the aforesaid sanction also provides for creation and filling of the Academic positions, such as the Director of Instruction, Director of Research and Director of Extension Education, Deans of the concerned 'Colleges and of Professors, Associate Professors and Assistant Professors and their equivalent academic positions in the University Grants Commission grades: And wheteis the Government of India in the. Department of Agricultural Research has approved the issuelmaking of an Ordinance prescribing the academic and other -- 1 of 7 -- 1' qualifications for the various academic and scientific positions for - the 'Central: Agricultural University vide letter No. 42(1)/94-EdM IV. dated 8th August, 1994. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Lead with clauses (n) and (q) of sub-section (!) of section 27 of the Central Agricultural University Act. 1992 (40 of 1992) and with the previous approval of the Central Government; I. the Vice:-Chancellor of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal, do hereby prescribe the following academic and other qualifications, for the purposes of appointment to various teaching /academic positions of the University, as mentioned against respective positions. I. Director of Essential: Instruction (i) Doctorate degree in any branch of Agricultural Sciences/Agricultural Engineering/Fisheries/ Veterinary Sciences ( ii) Minimum 15 years experience of teaching/ research/extension education in the concerned discipline, out of which at least ID years should he in teaChingin-an Agricultural University•system and at least 5.years should be in the rank of Professor, or equivalent. (iii) Outstanding contributions as evidenced by published papers in professional/national/. international journals of repute:books or technology developed. Desirable:.
